zh.lifeSummary: 當Alain DE ROHAN IX於1382年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯時，他的父親Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan31歲，母親Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet26歲。他和Marie de Lorraine至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1462年3月20日在法國德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alain DE ROHAN IX于1382年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯时，他的父亲Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan31岁，母亲Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet26岁。他和Marie de Lorraine至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1462年3月20日在法国德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: ROHAN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Kieran, Oonagh, Padraig, Siobhan.
Irish (Kerry and Cork): from Ó Ruadhacháin or Ó Robhacháin, see Rowan .
Breton and English: habitational name from Rohan in Morbihan, Brittany (France).

variants.name: Rowan
meanings: Irish: from Ó Ruadháin or Ó Ruaidhín, both meaning ‘descendant of Ruadhán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’. See also Rooney .

Irish: from Ó Ruadhacháin, ‘son of Ruadhachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’ (also used as a placename and Anglicized as Roughan). Compare also Rogan (Ó Ruadhagáin), of which may be a variant, both it and Ó Ruadhacháin being found in Ulster and Connacht.
Irish: from Ó Robhacháin, the name of a scattered ecclesiastical family, found in Clare in the 16th and 17th centuries. The personal name was earlier Reabhachán ‘skillful, artful’.

nameMeanings.name: Alain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton form of Alan, now common in all parts of France. See Alan .

en.lifeSummary: When Alain DE ROHAN IX was born in 1382, in Guilliers, Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan, was 31 and his mother, Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet, was 26. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Marie de Lorraine. He died on 20 March 1462, in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alain DE ROHAN IX est né en 1382, à Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Marie de Lorraine. Il est décédé le 20 mars 1462, à Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Lo: Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Alain DE ROHAN IX 1382 in Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan 31 und seine Mutter Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet 26. Er hatte mit Marie de Lorraine mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. März 1462 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alain DE ROHAN IX è nato il nel 1382 nel Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Marie de Lorraine. Morì il 20 marzo 1462, nel Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alain DE ROHAN IXが1382年にフランスブレタグンモービハングイリールズで生まれた時，父Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohanは31歳，母Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoetは26歳であった。彼はMarie de Lorraineとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1462年3月20日にフランスグランド エストメウルスエ-エト-モセルヴァウドeモントで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alain DE ROHAN IX(이)가 1382년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 길리어스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Marie de Lorraine(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1462년 3월 20일 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우르테-트-모셀 바드e몽에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alain DE ROHAN IX nasceu em 1382, em Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Marie de Lorraine. Ele faleceu em 20 de março de 1462, em Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, França, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alain DE ROHAN IX родился в 1382 г. в местности гуиллиирс, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Alain VIII, sire de Léon, Vicomte de 1396 à 1429 de Rohan было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de Clisson Comtesse de Porhoet, 26. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Marie de Lorraine. Он умер 20 марта 1462 г. в местности ваудeмонт, меурте-ет-моселл, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 80 лет.
